title: Argentinian Walnut Empanadas
description: Sweet empanadas filled with rich walnut filling, perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: Combine flour and sugar in a bowl.
Add butter to the flour mixture and mix until crumbly.
Gradually add eggs and heavy cream until dough forms.
Roll out dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter.
Place a spoonful of walnut filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold dough in half and press edges to seal.
Brush tops with heavy cream and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
